title: DEMS
subtitle: Discord Event Management System
description: A self-hosted event management system for Discord communities handling registrations, automation, and analytics through a clean dashboard and bot integration.

title: Spielersuche
subtitle: Discord Player Search Bot
description: A Discord bot that brings structured player search directly to your server. Start searches by game, mode and player count via slash command, get matched into temporary private channels, and manage your community with LFG roles, a ban system and full multi-server support.

title: Join
subtitle: Kanban Task Manager
description: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.

title: El Pollo Loco
subtitle: Browser Game
description: A mini Jump and Run game. Collect coins and salsa bottles to defeat the evil chicken boss.

title: Pokédex
subtitle: API Search Application
description: A Pokédex app that allows you to search for Pokémon by name. Displays detailed information about stats, types and abilities.

title: Portfolio (old version)
subtitle: Personal Website
description: Personal portfolio website built with Angular. Showcases projects, skills and provides a contact form with multi-language support.
